positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a celestial crescent moon cradling a stylized, geometric mountain peak. The mountain should be rendered in sharp, interlocking tessellations of deep navy blue and metallic silver, contrasted against a clean, pale gradient sky background. Incorporate small, scattered constellations formed by delicate gold-leaf dots (stellar dust effect). Use a woodcut and Bauhaus fusion style, emphasizing strong silhouettes, clean lines, and a harmonious, limited color palette (navy, silver, gold, pale blue). The composition must be centered and perfectly balanced for apparel printing, with ample white space for visual breathing room. Vector art quality, high contrast, flat design.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, watermark, text, logos, signatures, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, complex background, graffiti, poor anatomy
